title: fix(apps): credit hadadarjt for J.A.R.V.I.S. + UltimaX, drop dead CLI entry
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Credit where credit is due
gist.blurb: Fixed some missing metadata to ensure @hadadarjt gets proper credit (and Pollen!) for building J.A.R.V.I.S. and UltimaX Intelligence. We also pruned a dead CLI link to keep the garden tidy.
gist.summary: Updated the community apps directory to properly credit @hadadarjt for J.A.R.V.I.S. and UltimaX Intelligence, preventing incorrect tier downgrades.
gist.impact: Ensures the creator receives their proper Flower tier Pollen credits and removes a broken CLI link from the showcase.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an archivist or librarian, carefully writing a name tag for a glowing AI core (representing J.A.R.V.I.S.), while the Nomnom creature eats a broken, dusty link.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny librarian glasses, carefully attaching a name tag to a glowing high-tech AI core. Nearby, the round Nomnom creature happily eats a dusty, broken chain link. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
